description: Goal: expansion decides what quoted source exists, publication decides what facts that source defines. Signal: source sugar rewrites, recursive macro expansion, require/import macro readiness, and item/function-body expansion live behind one explicit expander API; publication consumes already-expanded roots/surfaces and no longer mixes tree rewriting with scope mutation logic. Strategy: extract the expansion walk out of source_publish, reuse it for item-level and function-level expansion, preserve fact-graph blocking semantics, and leave publication with reserve/apply responsibilities only.
title: Compiler2 source expansion: split quoted root rewriting from fact publication
